meaning: [动]科迪亚克熊,阿拉斯加棕熊
examples: It shares the title of largest land predator (and largest bear species) with the Kodiak bear.
Horowitz photographed this brown bear on Alaska's Kodiak Island. The retiree used a 70-200 mm zoom lens.
A brown bear hunts for fish in the Kodiak National Wildlife Refuge on an island off the southern coast of Alaska.
The Kulluk drillship ran aground in heavy seas on Dec. 31 near Kodiak Island.
The borough of Kodiak Island has about 13, 600 people, according to the U.S. Census Bureau.
